title: Washington County Registry of Deeds
description: No dedicated registry news/RSS feed exists; monitored by full-page fingerprint of the official registry page. All fee/hours info inline on a single page. KNOWN ISSUE: washingtoncountymaine.com has been returning HTTP 403 to this bot's requests (likely WAF bot-blocking) since mid-2026; kept enabled so the status dashboard surfaces it and it recovers automatically if the block is lifted.
